deals.title: Royal Caribbean Summer Explorer Sale — 7-Night Caribbean
deals.description: Sail roundtrip from Miami aboard Wonder of the Seas. Royal Caribbean's Summer Explorer Sale stacks free drinks, unlimited Wi-Fi, and $200 onboard credit on top of already-reduced fares — one of the best value sailings of the year.

deals.title: Walt Disney World Free Dining Fall Package
deals.destination: Orlando, FL · Walt Disney World Resort
deals.description: Disney's most popular promotion is back: book a Disney Resort hotel + Park Hopper tickets and receive a FREE standard dining plan for the entire stay. Coveted fall dates including Mickey's Not-So-Scary Halloween Party weekends are available.
perks: Free standard dining plan (quick service + table service)
Memory Maker photo package add-on available

deals.title: Norwegian Cruise Line 'Free at Sea' — 10-Night Mediterranean
deals.description: Norwegian's signature Free at Sea promotion lets you choose up to 5 free extras across a 10-night Mediterranean sailing — stack an open bar, specialty dining, shore excursions, unlimited Wi-Fi, and a cabin upgrade all in one booking.
perks: Choose any 5: open bar, specialty dining, shore excursions, Wi-Fi, or cabin upgrade

deals.title: Sandals Royal Jamaica — 7-Night Caribbean Sale
deals.description: Sandals' Caribbean Sale brings their world-renowned unlimited-luxury® all-inclusive to its lowest price of the season. Every meal, top-shelf drink, land and water sport, and butler-level service is included — no hidden charges, ever.
perks: 5th night free on select room categories

deals.title: ALG Vacations — Riviera Maya All-In (Air Included)
deals.description: Apple Vacations' early-booking bonus packages round-trip airfare, 7 nights at a 5-star beachfront resort, and private round-trip airport transfers into one locked rate — no juggling separate bookings or price creep.
perks: Round-trip airfare included from most US cities

deals.title: Pleasant Holidays Multi-Island Hawaii Hopper
deals.description: Pleasant Holidays' preferred-partner packaging covers inter-island flights, 10 nights of oceanfront accommodations across three islands, and a private Luau experience — all at a rate Jessica's clients can't replicate booking individually.

deals.title: Celebrity Cruises 'Always Included' — 7-Night Alaska Glaciers
deals.description: Celebrity's Always Included® ships every stateroom with classic beverages, unlimited Wi-Fi, and pre-paid gratuities. Add on Celebrity's Double Up promotion for a premium drink upgrade + premium Wi-Fi at no extra cost.
perks: Double Up: premium drinks + premium Wi-Fi upgrade free

deals.title: Disney Cruise Line — 4-Night Bahamian Voyage
deals.destination: Port Canaveral, FL to Nassau & Castaway Cay
deals.description: Disney Cruise Line's early-booking discount knocks 10% off regular fares on 4-night Bahamian sailings calling at Nassau and Disney's private island, Castaway Cay — with a $250 onboard credit to spend on excursions, spa, or specialty dining.
